description: Workflow for managing subscriber lifecycle and weekly cat fact delivery
name: weekly_cat_fact_subscription_workflow

transitions.description: Check unsubscribe request and set unsubscribed timestamp
transitions.end_state_description: Unsubscribe checked and timestamp set if requested
transitions.name: unsubscribe_check

externalized_processors.description: Check unsubscribe flag and set unsubscribedAt timestamp
externalized_processors.name: processUnsubscribeCheck

transitions.description: Send the weekly cat fact to subscribers
transitions.end_state_description: Weekly cat fact sent to subscriber
transitions.name: send_cat_fact

externalized_processors.description: Set last sent cat fact and timestamp
externalized_processors.name: processSendCatFact

transitions.start_state_description: Unsubscribe checked and timestamp set if requested

transitions.description: Track email opens by incrementing open count
transitions.name: track_email_open
transitions.start_state_description: Weekly cat fact sent to subscriber
